title: stipagrostis pennata subsp. minor
intro: Stipagrostis pennata subsp. minor, also known as the short spear grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to Southern Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Stipagrostis pennata subsp. minor include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including a poultice or decoction.
